codeReview.summary: MCP tool behavioral annotations (readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, idempotentHint) fully implemented. ToolBehavioralHints struct in swell_core, all built-in tools implement behavioral_hints(), McpToolAnnotations in mcp.rs with risk_level_from_annotations() and permission_tier() integration. 9 annotation tests passing.

summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All behavioral hint annotations are properly integrated with risk classification and policy engine.
